Connect your wallet to view eligibility and claim $PARAM.

If you did not claim before the claim deadline of 4am UTC on July 5, 2024, you are no longer eligible to claim.

What is $PARAM?

$PARAM is the primary digital token used within the Param Gaming ecosystem. It empowers users by granting them special access throughout the Ecosystem, voting rights via community governance, and opportunities for unique in-game content and Ecosystem rewards.

More about $PARAM

The PARAM ecosystem token ($PARAM) serves as the exclusive currency within the Param Gaming ecosystem, granting users access, privileges, and various opportunities across its array of platforms.
